race.comment: UNSTIRRED (10) was heavily backed on debut at Ballarat Synthetic to start $1.60 but ultimately battled home into fourth. Trusting that support and there's every chance he improves sharply back onto turf with that raceday experience. JUST LIKE JAGGER (2) ran a good race on debut at Geelong to grab second when getting back in the run. Imagine he's been set for this for the local camp which is always worth noting. HAVANA MOON (6) is off a freshen. The first-up run reads well before battling at Swan Hill. Untried this trip but has claims. SHUJINKO (5) is off a long spell but his formlines last time in read well for this. Watch the betting.
